publishedAbstract: - Getting permission denied while pod is trying to attach PVC: ~~~ Error: failed to resolve symlink "/var/lib/kubelet/pods/xxxx-d52b-4aab-966f-7bb7f2c0b59d/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/pvc-xxxx-b817-43a1-8a5e-2408dff21c44/mount": lstat /var/lib/kubelet/pods/xxxx-d52b-4aab-966f-7bb7f2c0b59d/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/pvc-xxxx-b817-43a1-8a5e-2408dff21c44/mount: permission denied ~~~- Pod is unable to start on specific node with error:`failed to resolve symlink /var/lib/kubelet/pods/: permission denied`.
publishedTitle: Unable to start ocs-operator pods with error 'failed to resolve symlink "/var/lib/kubelet/pods/xxxx: permission denied"' in RHOCP 4
